description: Scripted evaluator sequence for dry-run. Feed these returns to the Backend Evaluator (in order) instead of running real tests. The sequence exercises: (1) graduated re-evaluation strategy selection (full → component-scoped → full), and (2) oscillation detection — the same signature appears at call 1, resolves at call 2, and reappears at call 3.

strategyLogic.note: Strategy is determined by iterations[component] at the time of the eval call. iterations[C] is 0 when no fixes have been dispatched yet (initial state), increments to 1 after the first fix, and so on.
rules: iterations[component] == 0 → full (first failure, no fixes dispatched yet)
iterations[component] == 1 → component-scoped (one fix dispatched; narrow re-check)
special: if lastStrategy == component-scoped AND overall == pass → force full regression eval next (even if iterations[C] would select component-scoped again)

sequence.strategyReason: iterations[OrderService] == 0 → full (first failure, no fixes dispatched yet)
ALL previously-failing components have iterations[C] == 1 → component-scoped
lastStrategy == component-scoped AND overall == pass → full regression check. No fix was dispatched after call 2 (OrderService passed), so iterations[OrderService] remains 1.

oscillationTrace.call2: absent (resolved — OrderService passed in component-scoped eval, fix worked)
oscillationTrace.call3: reappears (fail) — full regression check reveals OrderService failure again → OSCILLATION DETECTED
